title: Turkish Lamb Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic Turkish-inspired dish made with lamb, rich spices, and fluffy pilaf. Perfect for a hearty dinner.
instructions: Heat the Rich in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the Lamb and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the Turkish Pilaf and stir to combine.
Add the Xanthy, Salt, and Black Pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and cover.
Simmer for 20 minutes, or until the pilaf is fluffy and the Lamb is cooked through.
Optional: garnish with fresh herbs, such as parsley or cilantro.
